metadata.title:
ALL ABOARD, THE new


LINE STARTS TODAY

pages.raw_text:
the first part OF next week and 1t
will not be long before the entire line
will be ready for business.


According to Superintendent Weeks
IL 1t were not for the slowness in
grading Sinto street. cars would have
been running on that line also.


The company has some IL or IS
miles of track, which is well dis
tributed throughout the city. When
its cars are all running and with
those now in the service of the
Washington Water Power company
Spokane will present very metro
politan appearance and without any
doubt have the greatest system of
street railway service in the west


The route to Corbin Park is along
Washington street Six cars are now
standing on the track, but this after
noon only two of them will be ready
for business. At the end of the line
in Corbin Park they as yet have no
loop. but this is contemplated for
future improvements.
